productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Front Pocket Brown Handbag
description: Urban chic has a new extension of its style, with this handbag from lino perros. Style and practicality combine in this stylish handbag, which you can pair with casual and formal ensembles. Made of synthetic leather for durability and style Two short handles for carrying ease and style One main zippered compartment with a zippered separator Mobile and organizer pouches inside One zippered compartments inside Two compatments on the front of the bag with metallic clasps for additional space Branded zippers Brand badge on the front Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
